member.name: M:EmployeeManagement.API.Controllers.EmployeeController.GetEmployeeById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Fetch a Employee Detail by EmployeeId

member.name: M:EmployeeManagement.API.Controllers.EmployeeController.UpdateEmployee(System.Int32,EmployeeManagement.Core.DTOs.EmployeeUpdateDTO)
member.param: Pass Employee ID whose details needs to be updated

member.name: M:EmployeeManagement.API.Controllers.EmployeeController.DeleteEmployee(System.Int32)
member.param: Pass Employee ID whose details needs to be removed
